title: PM Lane 183 - Local Field Observation Scratchpad Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power field-observation scan burden by grouping the existing Local Field Observation Scratchpad without changing field names, candidate-scoped browser storage, export inclusion, clear behavior, disclosure behavior, derived field-prep behavior, or field-authorization/write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Local Field Observation Scratchpad into Source And Area Observation, Access And Resource Observation, and PM Follow-up And Authority Boundary.

Preserved the same six textarea fields, field update handlers, candidate-scoped browser storage key, clear button behavior, export inclusion, derived field-prep behavior, disclosure behavior, and no-field-authorization/no-write language.
Kept the Local Field Observation Scratchpad disclosure behavior stateless with no field-observations disclosure localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.

validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; operations-web build passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 183 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
